errors.description: Continuous trust renewal has not started or no renewal packet has been accepted.
Continuous trust renewal is pending and has not refreshed device trust.
Continuous trust renewal is fresh, policy-bound, signed, and replay-resistant.
Continuous trust renewal validity window has expired or exceeds the governed renewal window.
Continuous trust renewal is blocked because the device identity fingerprint is revoked.
Continuous trust renewal nonce hash has already been used.
Continuous trust renewal packet is missing.
Continuous trust renewal packet is missing required bounded fields or contains malformed metadata.
Continuous trust renewal packet policy hash does not match the runtime policy hash.
Continuous trust renewal packet is not bound to the expected device identity fingerprint.
Continuous trust renewal signature is missing, invalid, or not signed by the trusted device key.
Continuous trust renewal cannot be verified because the device public key is untrusted.
Continuous trust renewal is not chained to the latest verified challenge evidence.
